languages.text: Янрис Данрок пригласил Вольного Торговца спуститься в Сектор Бионика, чтобы произвести личный осмотр пострадавшего устройства.
Janris Danrok has invited the Rogue Trader to come down to the Sector Bionica to personally inspect the ailing apparatus.
languages.original_text: Янрис Данрок пригласил Вольного Торговца спуститься в Сектор Бионика, чтобы произвести личный осмотр пострадавшего устройства.

traits.locale_text: Janris Danrok has invited the Rogue Trader to come down to the Sector Bionica to personally inspect the ailing apparatus.
Janris Danrok has invited the Rogue Trader to come down to the Sector Bionica to personally inspect the ailing apparatus.
Janris Danrok has invited the Rogue Trader to come down to the Sector Bionica to personally inspect the ailing apparatus.

languages.text: Janris Danrok ha invitado a{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente a visitar el Sector Bionica e inspeccionar personalmente el maltrecho aparato.
languages.original_text: Janris Danrok has invited the Rogue Trader to come down to the Sector Bionica to personally inspect the ailing apparatus.

traits.locale_text: Janris Danrok ha invitado a{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente a visitar el Sector Bionica e inspeccionar personalmente el maltrecho aparato.

languages.text: 詹里斯·丹罗克邀请行商浪人前往仿生区，亲自查看那台故障设备。
languages.original_text: Janris Danrok has invited the Rogue Trader to come down to the Sector Bionica to personally inspect the ailing apparatus.

traits.locale_text: 詹里斯·丹罗克邀请行商浪人前往仿生区，亲自查看那台故障设备。

languages.text: Janris Danrok a invité {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} dans le secteur Bionica afin d'inspecter l'appareil endommagé.
languages.original_text: Janris Danrok has invited the Rogue Trader to come down to the Sector Bionica to personally inspect the ailing apparatus.

traits.locale_text: Janris Danrok a invité {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} dans le secteur Bionica afin d'inspecter l'appareil endommagé.

languages.text: Janris Danrok, Hür Tacir'i arızalı aygıtı bizzat incelemesi için Sektör Biyonika'ya davet etti.
languages.original_text: Janris Danrok has invited the Rogue Trader to come down to the Sector Bionica to personally inspect the ailing apparatus.

traits.locale_text: Janris Danrok, Hür Tacir'i arızalı aygıtı bizzat incelemesi için Sektör Biyonika'ya davet etti.

languages.text: ジャンリス・ダンロックは、ローグ・トレーダーに、病床の装置を直接確認するために、セクター・ビオニカへ来るよう招待した。
languages.original_text: Janris Danrok has invited the Rogue Trader to come down to the Sector Bionica to personally inspect the ailing apparatus.

traits.locale_text: ジャンリス・ダンロックは、ローグ・トレーダーに、病床の装置を直接確認するために、セクター・ビオニカへ来るよう招待した。

languages.text: Janris Danrok hat {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} eingeladen, den leidenden Apparat im Sektor Bionica selbst zu inspizieren.
languages.original_text: Janris Danrok has invited the Rogue Trader to come down to the Sector Bionica to personally inspect the ailing apparatus.

traits.locale_text: Janris Danrok hat {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} eingeladen, den leidenden Apparat im Sektor Bionica selbst zu inspizieren.
